race.description: Felix Playing On-Course After The Last Today Hcp (C1)
race.comment: CAN'T CATCH ME (2) held on to win two back at Belmont before a 2.4L defeat on the Scarpside here when she probably didn't run out the extra trip. Back to 1400m here looks ideal and she'll be up on the speed from a good draw. Can give herself every chance to bounce back to winning ways. KAT FIVE (6) broke her maiden on the Scarpside here last start with an all-the-way victory, crossing from a wide draw to land the knockout blow. O'Donnell remains in the saddle today and she looks a filly on the rise. Can repeat the dose without surprising. FEARLESS TALK (5) is building nicely this time in work and looks primed for a big effort here third-up and out to her preferred trip. She hasn't won for a long time, though her last two efforts suggest she's not far off. Today could be her day. BANNERED (1) jumps right out in trip now and that won't be an issue from the good draw. Keep safe. KAZANA (9) can resume on a positive note after tackling stronger races last campaign.
